name: zetaSID
description: Expandable SID-based modular voice with OLED UI, CV/gate input and phybus linking. Runs lead or drum engines with six LFOs, dual envelopes, wave sequencers, arpeggiators and total recall.

inputs.name: CV In
inputs.description: Assigns pitch or modulation, configurable from bipolar CV ranges.

inputs.name: Gate In
inputs.description: Triggers the voice from an external gate source.

inputs.name: phybus MIDI In 1
inputs.description: Receives MIDI data over the phybus expansion link.

inputs.name: phybus MIDI In 2
inputs.description: Second phybus MIDI input for expanded control routing.

outputs.name: Audio Out
outputs.description: Eurorack-level audio output from the SID engine.

outputs.name: phybus MIDI Out
outputs.description: Sends MIDI data back out across the phybus network.

behaviors.name: Monophonic voice core
behaviors.description: The module boots as a single SID voice that can be played like a compact modular synth voice.

behaviors.name: Stereo pair link
behaviors.trigger: link two zetaSID modules via phybus
behaviors.description: Two modules combine into a true stereo instrument voice with shared patch cooperation.

behaviors.name: Polyphonic cluster
behaviors.description: Up to twelve modules can form six stereo voices, with the user interface split across cooperating modules.

behaviors.name: Lead and drum engines
behaviors.description: The lead engine provides LFOs, envelopes, wave sequencers and arpeggiators, while the drum engine focuses on parallel percussion instruments.

behaviors.name: Total recall
behaviors.description: MicroSD-backed patch and session storage makes the module practical for repeatable performances and preset banks.

behaviors.name: MIDI expansion
behaviors.trigger: add nexusMIDI or another phybus expander
behaviors.description: Unused CV and gate inputs can be repurposed once the module is expanded into a larger MIDI-controlled cluster.

patchIdeas.name: SID lead voice
patchIdeas.patch: Patch a keyboard or sequencer into CV / gate · use the lead engine's envelopes and arpeggiator for classic SID phrasing · send Audio Out straight to the rack mixer.
patchIdeas.diagram:
zetaSID:
* Engine: Lead
* Mode: Monophonic
* ROM: on

Keyboard:
Output:

- Keyboard (Pitch) p> zetaSID (CV In)
- Keyboard (Gate) g> zetaSID (Gate In)
- zetaSID (Audio Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Stereo pair
patchIdeas.patch: Link two zetaSID modules in phybus stereo mode · keep one focused on filter movement and the other on oscillator motion · the pair behaves like a single wider instrument voice.
patchIdeas.diagram:
zetaSID A:
* Engine: Lead
* Pair: left

zetaSID B:
* Engine: Lead
* Pair: right

Output:

- zetaSID A (Audio Out) -> Output (L)
- zetaSID B (Audio Out) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Drum engine rack
patchIdeas.patch: Switch to the drum engine · use gate and trigger inputs to play multiple percussion instruments from one compact voice module · the output becomes a programmable SID drum machine.
patchIdeas.diagram:
zetaSID:
* Engine: Drum
* Trigger Matrix: active

Clock:
Output:

- Clock (Out) c> zetaSID (Gate In)
- zetaSID (Audio Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Poly chain cluster
patchIdeas.patch: Chain several modules for more voices · spread one shared patch over multiple OLED screens · the old SID sound scales from monophonic to dense polyphony without leaving the rack.
patchIdeas.diagram:
zetaSID 1:
* Engine: Lead

zetaSID 2:
* Engine: Lead

Output:

- zetaSID 1 (Audio Out) -> Output (L)
- zetaSID 2 (Audio Out) -> Output (R)
